_comment: Bifrost Hook Registry — defines listeners for mesh events. Hooks fire via POST /hook on any node.

on_task_complete.description: Fires when a War Room task transitions to 'done'.

on_error.description: Fires when any command execution returns a non-zero exit or raises an exception.

on_model_fallback.description: Fires when a node falls back from cloud to local model due to API failure or timeout.

actions.template: [INFO:fallback] {node} fell back to local model ({local_model}). Cloud model {cloud_model} unavailable.

on_denial_spike.description: Fires when anomaly watchdog detects 3+ denials in 60s from same caller.

actions.template:
⚠️ *SECURITY ALERT — {node}*

Caller `{caller}` has {count} denials in 60s.
Last command: `{command}`

on_node_down.description: Fires when cluster-status detects a node stops responding.

action_types.telegram_notify: Send a Telegram message using _send_telegram_rest(). Template vars: {node}, {caller}, {command}, {error}, {count}
action_types.war_room_post: POST a message to /war-room/post on localhost. Template vars: same as above.
action_types.http_post: POST to an arbitrary URL with the event payload as JSON body. Requires 'url' field.
